name: Cyberpunk Text Adventure Game
story:
You are a part of a specialized police unit who hunt humanoid AI androids who have gone rogue.
Your unit has informed you of a rogue android that has taken over the AI research facility that needs to be taken care of... permanently,
but first you will need a collection of items to aid you in your fight.
You will need Cybernetic Armor to protect yourself against the Android's attacks,
a Drone to help attack the Android,
a Signal Jammer to block the Android from calling for back up,
a Data Disc to learn the Android's weakness,
a Blaster Gun to attack the Android,
and a Hacking Device to undo any damage the Android has done to the server,
loseBattleMessage: You were taken out by the AI Android!
